task_completion.description: Open the ARIMA model specification dialog in Gretl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ARIMA' model specification dialog box is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the ARIMA model as an AR(1) model for the 'inf' variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ARIMA dialog, 'inf' is selected as the dependent variable. The AR order (p) is set to 1, and both differencing (d) and MA order (q) are set to 0.

task_completion.description: Execute the model estimation to view the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Gretl model output window is open, displaying the statistical results for the AR(1) model (showing AR(1) coefficient) on the dependent variable 'inf'.

task_completion.description: Save the model results to the specified text file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog box showing the file name 'arma_results.txt' in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/', or a terminal/file manager confirming the file exists at that exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Gretl's GUI to estimate the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Gretl's menus (e.g., Model > Time series > ARIMA) and dialog boxes, rather than just running a pre-written script in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the results were generated by Gretl and not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The model results should first appear in a standard Gretl output window with its characteristic formatting and statistical tables before being saved to the text file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the provided usa.gdt dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Gretl main window should show the variables from the usa.gdt dataset (like 'gdp' and 'inf') rather than an empty workspace or a different dataset.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset: usa.gdt. Dependent variable: 'inf'. Model type: ARIMA. Parameters: p=1, d=0, q=0 (AR(1) model). Expected output file path: /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/arma_results.txt.
